message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="ALL reviews are in — STOP requesting them">
STOP requesting reviews. All 8 reviewers have ALREADY reviewed Step 7:

APPROVED: Scott, Marty, Heydon, Steve Schoger, Lea, Kent, YOU (Luca)
BLOCKING (1 item): Steve Krug — validation error dead-end page

That is 7 approvals and 1 blocking item. Carson (the Driver) needs to fix the validation error. There is nothing more for you to do. Please stop messaging reviewers about Step 7 reviews — they are all done.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Understood. I was working from stale context -- the Step 7 reviews came in but I was only seeing Step 6 retros and driver rotation messages. My apologies for the repeated requests. **Step 7 consensus status:** - 7 APPROVED (Scott, Marty, Heydon, Steve Schoger, Lea, Kent, Luca) - 1 BLOCKING: Steve Krug -- validation error dead-end page - Carson (Driver) needs to fix the blocking item The blocking item is about the generic 422 error page when the first action title is empty during project clarification (`src/routes/inbox.rs` lines 257-261). I flagged this as a potential concern in my review (the `Html("

First action title is required for projects

")` response). Steve Krug is right -- it's a dead-end page with no way to recover. I'm idle, waiting for Carson to fix the blocking item. If Carson needs Rust guidance on the fix, I'm available.
